title: Cleanliness Drive
description: A web application designed to promote cleanliness and hygiene in communities. The application allows users to organize and participate in cleanliness drives, track their contributions, and collaborate with others to keep their surroundings clean. Users can create events, invite friends, and share their progress on social media. The application can also include features for tracking waste collection, providing tips for maintaining cleanliness, and rewarding users for their efforts in keeping the environment clean.
tech: Local Storage or a backend database for storing event and user data
Social Media API for sharing progress and events
